text: - **"Why a wiki, and not a summary"** — anchor-and-grow vs. dump-and-dilute, the PRODUCT_MODEL.md rejection turned into a confident architectural stance ("We tried that. It's the wrong shape."). The fix-vs-rule distinction from llm-wiki. [...] - **"What it refuses to do"** — distill-don't-dump, evidence-with-decay, contradictions preserved, librarian-not-author. A memory system earns trust by its refusals. [...] On not overselling: the closing **Status** section is honest — "research-grade, not a product you should trust with anything you can't afford to re-derive" — and it's explicit that the loop is the active frontier while the local engine is the solid part.
